channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Nintendo teases they'd 'like to adhere' to the Super Mario Galaxy Movie's lore in future games — including Princess Peach's backstory
item.description: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie could inform future Nintendo games, despite the mixed response from audiences.

item.title: J’ai testé le TV Samsung 55S99H : le QD‑OLED 55 pouces le plus ambitieux de Samsung en 2026
item.description: Le Samsung TQ55S99H est la déclinaison 55 pouces du nouveau fleuron QD‑OLED de la marque coréenne pour 2026. Visant un public exigeant à la recherche d’une image spectaculaire, d’un design à forte personnalité et des performances de haut niveau en jeu vidéo, je l’ai testé et en voici mes impressions.

item.title: Microsoft brings Xbox back, scraps Microsoft Gaming
item.description: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma has had a busy week. Sharma held an internal town hall with Xbox employees today, just days after announcing an Xbox Game Pass price cut, commenting on the status of the Xbox mobile store, and teasing a mysterious Xbox and Discord partnership. One of the items on the agenda for the […]

item.title: Rivian begins production on the R2 electric SUV
item.description: Rivian has begun production of its R2 SUV. However, you can't get one just yet: The first customer deliveries (of the most expensive version) aren't expected until later this spring.On Wednesday, CEO RJ Scaringe drove the first electric SUV off the production line at the company's Normal, IL, factory. A storage and logistics building at that factory was damaged by a tornado last weekend, with Wednesday's rollout event seemingly designed to reassure nervous customers and investors."We are really excited to be producing R2 for our customers," Scaringe is quoted as saying in a news release. Howev...

item.title: Keychron’s customizable V1 mechanical keyboard is back down to $45
item.description: If you’ve ever wished your laptop keyboard was better tailored to your workflow, the Keychron V1 is a solid upgrade. It doesn’t cost as much as most other mechanical keyboards, but it still offers a lot of the same flexibility. And now through April 25th, you can buy the wired board for $44.99 ($30 off) […]

item.title: Nintendo fans are suing the company for a tariff refund — but they're unlikely to succeed
item.description: If gamers have their way, tariff refunds will flow all the way back to customers rather than Mario’s pockets.

item.title: Five Annapurna Interactive games get Switch 2 releases
item.description: If you’re a Switch 2 owner itching for something new to play and you happen to be partial to an Annapurna Interactive game, then boy is it your lucky day. The prolific indie publisher has announced that five of its titles are coming to Switch 2, three in the form of next-gen upgrades and two for the first time on Nintendo platforms. The magnificent Sayonara Wild Hearts and Lorelei and the Laser Eyes are available starting today, complete with 120Hz and 4K upgrades for Nintendo’s latest console. First-time buyers can grab Sayonara Wild Hearts for $13, while 2024’s Lorelei and the Laser Eyes cos...

item.title: Bluesky now supports better quality photos
item.description: The max size is now 2MB and max resolution is 4000x4000.

item.title: "Hackers can now launch massive 2Tbps attacks": Report reveals staggering 10x growth in botnet size with record-breaking DDoS incidents peaking for 40 minutes as multi-vector attacks grow in complexity and become harder to dismantle
item.description: Largest botnet grows tenfold in a year as sustained 2Tbps attack signals growing scale of modern DDoS campaigns.

item.title: Microsoft offers buyout for up to 7% of U.S. employees
item.description: If a worker's years of service at Microsoft plus their age equals 70 or more, they will be eligible for a voluntary retirement buyout.

item.title: Nintendo Switch 2 Joy‑Con, iPhone Air et VTT électrique Lidl Crivit : les 3 meilleurs bons plans du jeudi 23 avril 2026
item.description: Ce jeudi 23 avril 2026, plusieurs produits très attendus sont en forte promotion.

item.title: I found a £449 Lenovo mini PC deal for the office — the compact IdeaCentre Mini with Intel Core 5 processor and 16GB RAM gets a huge price cut in Amazon's surprise Tech Week sale but stock is running out fast
item.description: The Lenovo IdeaCentre Mini Desktop delivers modern performance in a compact design, and it’s currently priced under £450.

item.title: There's a massive Sony headphones sale ahead of its expected new launches — score record-low prices starting at just $39.99
item.description: Just ahead of Sony's rumored 2026 release, you can score massive discounts on existing Sony headphones and earbuds, with prices starting at just $39.99.

item.title: Ubisoft has finally dropped a trailer for that Assassin's Creed: Black Flag remake
item.description:
Ubisoft has finally given us some real details about Assassin's Creed: Black Flag Resynced, after confirming the remake earlier this year. It's set to release on July 9 for PC, PS5 and Xbox Series X/S. There's a trailer and it looks absolutely gorgeous, with graphics resembling recent entries like Assassin's Creed Shadows. This is a real-deal remake, and not a port. This version seems to feature a fair amount of new content, but still stars protagonist Edward Kenway.
There's a new weather system and an upgraded underwater exploration system. Combat has been refined to closer match new entrie...

item.title: JMGO N3 Ultimate le vidéoprojecteur à balancelle qui s’installe très facilement
item.description: Annoncé au CES 2026, le JMGO N3 Ultimate passe officiellement à la phase de commercialisation, avec un prix de lancement de 2499 € pour les premiers acheteurs. L'occasion de revenir sur ce qui distingue réellement ce modèle du reste de la gamme N3.

item.title: Forget the cloud or pricey portable SSDs — back up your files restore classic disc backups to modern laptops with these budget DVD writer deals
item.description: These budget DVD writers bring disc support back to modern laptops, and both are available at great prices right now.

item.title: PlayStation users are now being asked for age verification in the UK and Ireland, or risk losing access to communication features when it soon becomes mandatory
item.description: Sony has begun rolling out PlayStation age verification for users in the UK and Ireland.

item.title: Major Russian Android apps know who's using a VPN, digital rights group warns
item.description: Researchers at digital rights group RKS Global found that 30 out of the 30 most popular Russian Android apps can detect VPNs, with numbers likely to rise.

item.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced revealed — 'Every single small moment of the game had to be rebuilt and crafted' developer says
item.description: Ubisoft has revealed Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced, an expansive remake set to launch later this year.

item.title: 'It really is like having your own personal camera operator': The Insta360 Link 2 is the 4K webcam to buy in Amazon's big tech sale — but I found 4 more deals you won't want to miss if you're a creator or business professional
item.description: 4K resolution, AI tracking, and video quality that's "exceptionally high."

item.title: Vercel identifies more accounts 'with evidence of prior compromise' exposed during security incident
item.description: The compromise was bigger than initially thought, and it seems some accounts were broken into even before that.

item.title: Écrans géants et 728 km d’autonomie : la nouvelle BMW i7 se dévoile
item.description: Le constructeur bavarois dévoile une mise à jour majeure de sa berline électrique de luxe. En intégrant les innovations issues de la nouvelle plateforme technologique Neue Klasse, la BMW i7 promet une autonomie record et une refonte complète de son habitacle numérique. Pour BMW, c'est même « la mise à jour la plus ambitieuse de l'histoire du BMW Group »....

item.title: Palantir Employees Are Starting to Wonder if They're the Bad Guys
item.description: Interviews with current and former Palantir employees, along with internal Slack messages obtained by WIRED, suggest a workforce in turmoil.

item.title: La Chine est la championne mondiale du recyclage d’appareils électroniques
item.description: Pour la troisième année consécutive, Pékin subventionne massivement le renouvellement d'appareils électroniques. En face, l'Europe rédige des directives. Le match est plié.

item.title: iPhone 18 Pro et 18 Pro Max : Dynamic Island revisité, puce A20 Pro, nouveautés photo… Tout ce que l’on sait déjà sur le futurs smartphones
item.description: Les rumeurs se font de plus en plus nombreuses sur les iPhone 18 Pro et iPhone 18 Pro Max. Voici un récapitulatif des informations autour des futurs smartphones Apple prévus pour 2026.

item.title: Inside Microsoft’s wave of executive departures
item.description: It feels like not a week has gone by this year without a senior Microsoft executive leaving the company. Some departures have triggered sweeping shakeups of Microsoft's biggest businesses, while others have seen fresh faces replace veteran employees. Executive departures at Microsoft are nothing new, but the pace feels notable this early in the year. […]...

item.title: Era raises $11M to build a software platform for AI gadgets
item.description: Era thinks that we will see many form factors of AI hardware, including glasses, rings, and pendants

item.title: Meta is revamping its cross-app management system
item.description: Meta's Accounts Center will transition to the Meta Account, which is supposed to make it easier to manage your experience on various Meta apps and devices.

item.title: How to watch NFL Draft 2026: FREE live streams, schedule, TV channels
item.description: As the best up-and-coming players are divvied up over three days in Pittsburg, see how to watch NFL Draft 2026 live streams around the world.

item.title: AI sycophancy could be more insidious than social media filter bubbles
item.description: Chatbots often care more about making human users feel good than they do about giving the unvarnished truth. Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week via email here.

item.title: Someone allegedly used a hairdryer to rig Polymarket weather bets
item.description: A hairdryer was allegedly used to rig Polymarket bets on the weather at Charles de Gaulle airport in Paris, according to a report by The Telegraph. French authorities note that the official temperature readings at the airport spiked twice in the past month, reaching levels much higher than expected. On both occasions, gamblers on Polymarket appear to have walked away with thousands upon thousands of dollars by betting on those temperature fluctuations. The gambling site relies on readings from temperature sensors, and the one at Charles de Gaulle airport is on a public road. This makes it easy...

item.title: Meilleures souris gamer en 2026 : quel modèle choisir pour votre setup ?
item.description: La souris gaming est l'accessoire indispensable de toute personne souhaitant jouer sur PC. Souris premium, sans fil, RGB, ou encore abordables... on a tout testé, on vous dit quelles sont nos préférées !

item.title: UK government’s child safety plans could expose kids to 'greater harms,' warns VPN industry group
item.description: The VPN Trust Initiative (VTI) has formally responded to the UK government's consultation, warning that treating VPNs as a loophole could jeopardize young people's online safety by exposing them to greater harm.

item.title: Talking to AI agents is one thing — what about when they talk to each other? New startup BAND debuts 'universal orchestrator'
item.description: For the past eighteen months, the corporate world has been obsessed with the "builder" phase of the generative AI revolution. Enterprises have raced to deploy autonomous agents to handle everything from customer support to complex codebase refactoring. However, as these digital workers proliferate, a new, more structural problem has emerged: fragmentation. Agents built on LangChain cannot easily hand off tasks to those built on CrewAI; a Salesforce-embedded agent has no native way to coordinate with a custom-built Python script running on a private cloud. Today, a new startup, BAND (also known...

item.title: Hisense voit les choses en grand pour le lancement de la technologie RGB MiniLED : un jeu concours FNAC avec de nombreux lots à gagner ! [Sponso]
item.description: Le futur du MiniLED est là. Dévoilés pendant le CES, les TV RGB-MiniLED débarquent en France avec la gamme UR9S de Hisense. L’occasion pour le constructeur de lancer une opération de précommande d’envergure chez Fnac avec une Chasse aux Pixels en prime.

item.title: This Razer DeathAdder Essential for under £20 is everything you need in a cheap gaming mouse
item.description: When it comes to gaming mice, I think the Razer DeathAdder is still one of the best cheap options out there, and it's now a bargain for under £20 at Amazon.

item.title: X is shutting down Communities because of low usage and lots of spam
item.description: X Communities are no more. Only a fraction of X users were using Communities, and much of that use was spam, the company said.

item.title: I tried the app Whoop just sued — and it’d be a real shame if it lost the battle
item.description: I tried both Whoop and Bevel to see if they really are strikingly, infringingly similar.

item.title: Le chinois Changan viserait l’Espagne pour son usine de voitures électriques, et il n’est pas le seul
item.description: Le constructeur chinois Changan serait en train d'évaluer plusieurs sites dans le nord de l'Espagne pour y installer une usine. Une stratégie qui s'inscrit dans une tendance plus large où les constructeurs chinois ne souhaitent plus seulement vendre des voitures en Europe, mais s'installer durablement sur le Vieux Continent.

item.title: Tesla : 4 millions de voitures ne rouleront jamais seules, la promesse du FSD vole en éclats
item.description: Elon Musk l'a reconnu lors du bilan trimestriel : les Tesla équipées du Hardware 3 n'atteindront jamais la conduite autonome complète. Des millions de clients ont payé pour une promesse désormais caduque.

item.title: 25 years later, is it time for a new iPod?
item.description: This is Lowpass by Janko Roettgers, a newsletter on the ever-evolving intersection of tech and entertainment, syndicated just for The Verge subscribers once a week. This year marks the 25th anniversary of the original iPod. With its monochrome display, mechanical scroll wheel, and 5 GB hard drive, Apple's pioneering music player now looks like the […]...

item.title: Oubliez GoPro : la DJI Osmo Action 5 Pro en pack avec 3 batteries supplémentaires est à -40 %
item.description: En 2024, la DJI Osmo Action 5 Pro était élue Action Cam de l'année par la rédaction de Frandroid. Deux ans plus tard, l'appareil est toujours efficace puisqu'il peut s'adapter à tous les terrains. Pour celles et ceux qui vivent avec la poussière dans les cheveux, le pack Aventure se trouve à 279 euros au lieu de 449 euros chez JoyBuy.

item.title: 'It would be my pick': I tested the LG C6 and LG C5 OLED TVs side-by-side, and I'm impressed by the upgrade — but it's not all clear-cut
item.description: The LG C5 was one of 2025's top TVs and after comparing it with this year's LG C6, the latter is a worthy successor.

item.title: Big screen on a budget: The Hisense 75-inch QD7 Mini LED 4K TV just hit a record-low price
item.description: Amazon and Best Buy dropped the price of the Hisense 75-inch QD7 Mini LED QLED 4K TV to just $499.99 — a new best price ever.

item.title: ‘A phone that just works’ — I tested the Samsung Galaxy A57, and it's a competent all-rounder with no wow factor
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy A57 has a thin body, clean software, and a good-looking screen, making it great as an everyday phone. But it struggles with performance and photography.

item.title: Lego just dropped two Shrek builds — preorders are live and come with free gifts
item.description: Lego Shrek builds launch on June 1. Preorder today to secure the BrickHeadz Shrek, Donkey & Gingy Figures and the Lego Shrek, Donkey & Puss in Boots.
